steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Add $9x$ to both sides of $9x-23=23-9x$: $$18x=46.$$ The coefficient on $x$ is nonzero, so there is a unique solution.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There is exactly one solution. That confirms B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, Exactly one, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
